phaseName: Rewrite Car.jsx with layout and JSX fixes
goal: Rewrite src/components/Car.jsx so the rendered cards are smaller (Bootstrap grid column), the date+reviews row uses flex spacing with reviews wrapped in a button, the card-body inner structure has spacing both between paired items and between the two outer divs, and the footer has space between price and Buy Now button. Also fix the existing `class=` parse error on the h5 and remove the unused `React` import.
summary: Phase 1 complete: rewrote /home/rejeo/Projects/car-showroom/src/components/Car.jsx from scratch with all 8 changes (removed unused React import, fixed class=→className= on h5, wrapped each card in col-md-6 col-lg-4 mb-4 inside a row, restructured date+reviews row to d-flex justify-content-between with reviews wrapped in a clickable button, restructured card-body to d-flex flex-column gap-3 with inner pairs d-flex justify-content-between, restructured footer to card-footer d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center, added alt text and key={index}). All 4 verification steps passed: AST walk for no bare class=, 5-check AST walk for structural layout requirements, npm run build (23 modules, 423ms, no errors), npx eslint (exit 0, zero warnings). Only Car.jsx was modified.
stepSummaries:
1. Rewrite src/components/Car.jsx: (a) remove the unused `import React from "react";`, (b) wrap each card in a `<div className="col-md-6 col-lg-4 mb-4">` inside a `<div className="row">` so cards are smaller and responsive, (c) make the date+reviews row a `<div className="d-flex justify-content-between">` and wrap the reviews number in a `<button type="button" className="btn btn-link p-0">` element so it is clickable, (d) inside `card-body`, give the two outer divs `d-flex flex-column gap-3` and each inner pair `d-flex justify-content-between` so both inter-pair and intra-pair spacing exists, (e) give the card footer `d-flex justify-content-between align-items-center`. Also fix the bare `class=` to `className=` on the title h5. Preserve all car data bindings. [verified]
  2. Verify the four structural layout requirements via @babel/parser AST walk: (1) a grid column class (col-md-6 or col-lg-4 or similar) appears on the card wrapper, (2) `d-flex justify-content-between` appears on the date+reviews row, (3) the reviews content `{car.reviews}` is wrapped in a `<button>` element, (4) `d-flex` and a gap utility appear on the card-body inner divs, (5) `d-flex justify-content-between` appears on the footer. [verified]
  3. Run `npm run build` to confirm the project compiles after the JSX fixes (h5 class=→className= and removing unused React import) and the new layout markup. [verified]
  4. Run `npx eslint src/components/Car.jsx` and confirm zero errors on the rewritten file. [verified]

No proxies or sentinels.

gateVerdicts.rationale: Phase goal: rewrite Car.jsx with smaller cards, flex-spaced date+reviews row with reviews wrapped in a button, properly-spaced card-body, and flex-spaced footer, plus JSX bug fixes. The final file at src/components/Car.jsx contains all 8 changes (verified by the AST walks), builds cleanly (Vite 23 modules), and lints cleanly (ESLint exit 0). Phase goal fully delivered.
